## Test plan

- [ ] `python -m pytest` passes locally
- [ ] If touching the network/transport path, manually verified with `scripts/smoke_connect.py`
- [ ] If touching the .dxt manifest, rebuilt and re-installed in Claude Desktop
- [ ] Updated `README.md` / `SECURITY.md` / `.env.example` if behaviour changed
